case_title: EBONY G FLOURNOY VS. TARGET CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLOURNOY, EBONY G AS TO DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLOURNOY, EBONY G ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY FLOURNOY, EBONY G AS TO DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/28/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF EBONY G FLOURNOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACKSON IMMENDORF. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLOURNOY, EBONY G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION TARGET IS LIABLE ONLY FOR DANGEROUS CONDITIONS OR HAZARDS ON ITS PROPERTY. HERE MS. FLOURNOY TESTIFIED THAT GROCERIES FROM HER CART FELL ON HER FOOT BUT I HAVE NO EVIDENCE THAT THIS OCCURRED THROUGH TARGET'S NEGLIGENCE OR BECAUSE OF A DEFECT IN ITS CART ESCALATOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
